reviews.review_description: the slow paced action shows the games weaknesses. probably fun for a child or non gamer. good effort though. maybe reskin and tweak the engine for more experienced gamers
Requires you to be able to spin in your seat. Very uncomfortable game to play on trains or airplanes. Not handicap friendly

reviews.review_title: Fixed... now installs/runs w. GearVR S10
reviews.review_description:
Update:  Thank you, Devs, for doing what too few Oculus devs do, and actually diagnosing and FIXING the problem with your software!

My former 1-star review...  for an unplayable purchased game...  has returned to its original 5-star level, as one of the best VR games available for this platform!
Too bad I was so excited for this game but it never installed I've been trying since yesterday , uhg

developer_response.body: Please try our latest update, which is rolling out now. We hope this fixes your issue. Please let us know. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Overlord was installed until my s9+ upgraded to android 9. Now its uninstalled, and won't re install due to error. Of three games this affected the developers have updated 2. This is the last and I've not received a response from the developer. Shows how much they care......

developer_response.body: Please try our latest update, which is rolling out now. We hope this fixes your issue. Please let us know. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: of the game. If You could change it.

reviews.review_title: Fun & Underrated & Hours of Play Time
reviews.review_description:
I had a blast playing this! Love the twist in playing the overlord defending against invading heroes. Game mechanics, combination of spells, monsters and traps and overall strategic flexibility are cool. Wish they had a replay the level button...(they do... I just missed it earlier) 

All in all, I really enjoyed it!  Hours and hours of fun, lots of level replay ability with diff strategies and well worth the $5 for me
I really enjoy the game - the monsters are cute and spellcasting is fun - I also like the little daemon
Games been unable to even be installed for a while should be updated or removed.

developer_response.body: Please try our latest update, which is rolling out now. We hope this fixes your issue. Please let us know. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This is actually a great little game and the graphics are pretty good too. It's fairly slow paced but needs a lot of thinking and planning if you want to complete each level with the maximum amount of stars. Keep in mind the low price and the fact you're playing this on a Go and you should be reasonably impressed with it. Well worth a look and the money.

reviews.review_title: This is an extremely short demo
reviews.review_description: Dungeon defence game with mediocre graphics, horrible jerky animations, graphics style that isn’t my cup of tea. Free version only has a few basic tutorial levels. Will delete without hesitation.
It downlods but when reach 100%, gives an error message.
